name: Lewis, Florence
motto: "Small in stature, with a mind supreme that knoweth not the meaning of the word impossible."
clubs: Member of Y. W. C. A. Cabinet, 1922-23
Secretary of Home Economics Club, second term, 1922-23
Secretary of Yuma Society, last term, 1922-23

name: Franks, Royal
motto: "Tis better to wear out than rust out."
clubs: President of Yuma Society, second term, 1921-22
Vice President of Yuma Society, second term, 1922-23

name: Smith, Gladys
motto: "As welcome as sunshine in every place. So the beaming approach of a good-natured face."
clubs: Member of Y. W. C. A. Cabinet, 1922-23
President of Home Economics Club, last term, 1922-23
Secretary of Garland Society, last term, 1922-23
description: She has made a host of friends. She is our Class Vamp.

name: Parrott, Fletcher
motto: "It is not good that man should live alone."
clubs: President of Garland Society, second term, 1921-22
description: Entered school in October, 1918, but did not stay long. He came back the next year and stayed until Christmas. He came back in 1921 and stayed with us.

name: Jennie, Owens
description: She gladdens our hearts with music from her skillful voice, and with the sunshine that ever lights her way.

name: Mayzell, Parrott
motto: "Laugh and the world laughs with you."
description: He has made lots of friends.

name: Irene, Andress
motto: "She's a shark—enough said."

name: Baxter, Spencer
motto: "I would rather sit alone on a pumpkin, independently than to be crowded on velvet cushions."
description: Baxter entered school in 1919 and has been a very popular student. He is a true Yuma and has won a host of friends. He is always willing to do his part.

name: Wallace, Alice
motto: "There was none like her—none."

name: Graham, John
motto: "The value of man's life is measured in terms of action and idealism."
clubs: Chaplain of Garland Society, second term, 1921-22
Vice President of Y. M. C. A., 1922-23
Vice President Garland Society, third term, 1921-23
President of Garland Society, first term, 1922-23
Vice President of Garland Society, second term, 1920-21
Business Manager of Mule Rider Staff, 1922-23

name: McNeese, Alice
motto: "Happiness is cheaper than worry—so why pay the higher price?"
clubs: Secretary of Yuma Society, third term, 1920
Critic of Yuma Society, first term, 1921
Editor of Society and Club Organizations for the Mule Rider, 1923

name: Hamilton, Kenneth
motto: "It isn't so much what a man stands for as what he falls for."
clubs: Vice President of Garland Society, first term, 1922-23
Secretary of Y. M. C. A., 1922-23
President of Garland Society, last term, 1922-23

name: Smith, Edna
motto: "The purest treasure mortal times afford is a spotless reputation."
clubs: Librarian of Garland Society, second term, 1920-21
President of Home Economics Club, second term, 1922-23

name: Moses, Fonzie
motto: "Nothing humbler than ambition when it's about to climb."
clubs: Assistant Art Editor of the Mule Rider staff, 1921-22
President of Garland Society, second term, 1922-23

name: Ware, Ruby
motto: "Better to be born lucky than rich."
clubs: Secretary of Garland Society, first term, 1921-22

name: Mullins, Edmond
motto: "Jog on!"
description: Chief occupation is "Going home."

name: King, Nora
motto: "Her future is aglow with possibilities."
clubs: Secretary, Yuma Literary Society, third term, 1921-22
Secretary, Home Economics Club, second term, 1922-23

name: Measles, Anna Mae
motto: "Almost to all things she could turn her hand."
clubs: Member, Y. W. C. A. Cabinet, 1921-22 and 1922-23
President, Home Economics Club, first term, 1922-23
Home Economics Editor, Mule Rider staff, 1922-23

name: Lowe, Zeb
motto: "How do I love thee? Let me count the ways. I love thee to the depth and breadth and height my soul can reach, when feeling out of sight for thy being an ideal 'Grace'."
clubs: Vice President, Garland Society, two terms

name: Smith, Marie
motto: "We may live without money, without friendship and books, but civilized man cannot live without cooks."
description: Marie has been with us only one year. She seems to be more interested in home economics than any other subject, as she is taking a special course.

name: Garner, Ira
motto: "The vocation of every man and woman is to serve other people."
clubs: Chaplain, Yuma Society, first term, 1921, third term, 1922, and second term, 1923
Vice President, Yuma Society, third term, 1920, and second term, 1922
description: "Uncle" has been with us a long time. You will see his picture among the juniors, but he is a lucky fellow as he became a senior right at the last. He is one of our most popular students.

name: Stephens, Eva
description: Eva is quiet and studious With a heart that is kind and true And always her share of the work she'll do.

name: Baker, Robert
description: "Bakers" are useful to the cook, So girls all for "Bobbie" look; He's a good hand in the kitchen, And you bet, he's bewitching.

name: DeLaugher, Pauline
description: She is not very large, but very small, Her hair is red and that's not all; She's very pretty and awful sweet, And says "she can't be beat."

name: Lewis, Hazel
description: There are many kinds of keys, But the only one for me is "Hazel."

name: Morrison, Earl
description: In every thing that comes his way, "Earl" is into it without fail.

name: Jarvis, Emmett
description: In class room or debate, He's right there and is never late.

name: Velvin, Kathrine
description: Of all the boys I ever met, I think my "Polly" is the best.

name: Morgan, Helen
description: She is a leader as well as good, She does all her tasks as a girl should, She is not a flirt, she's not fiery, She is a nice little girl, So thinks Ira.

name: Souter, Glenn
description: Glenn Souter is our class President; Of McKamie, he is a resident, He is good, wise, and true, And would be a good friend for you.

name: Stull, George
description: Honest and ugly, but always laughing, "Happy" makes friends wherever he goes.

name: Daily, Walter
description: A strong man who is gentle in his way.

name: Twitty, Walter
description: "Tweet" will win through storm and strife, Provided he lives all the days of his life.

name: Phillips, Elwood
description: A handsome form and a beautiful face, A very good man in a really good place.

name: Dodson, Tom
description: Champion pigs by Tom are raised; And his classwork, by the teachers praised.

name: Mast, Ruth Evelyn
description: Miss Ruth Evelyn Mast Will try to the very last, To win a fame, That will match her name.

name: Walton, Ola
description: A girl of studious turn, And for her future husband, The bread she'll never burn.

name: Greer, Dolph
description: Nature just framed strange fellow in her day.

name: Spicer, Charles
description: Charles is a very studious boy. Chemistry and Geometry are his joy.

name: Ridling, Gillie
description: Sweet and lovable as can be. Why everyone loves her is plain to see.

name: Talley, Leona
description: She's jolly and sociable, And will surely be a success. Now, boys! On that put stress.

name: Hendrix, Carl
description: Carl is a good boy as we all know, But how he does love his authority to show; His favorite expression is "O Boy! Hot Stuff!" But never mind "Hens" just a bluff.

name: Godwin, Elmer
description: Large in body and in soul, With a heart as pure as gold.

name: Talley, Beatrice
description: A loving girl of noble mind; Lucky will be he who can say, "She is mine."

name: Epton, Frank
description: A studious boy admired by every one. When he undertakes a task it is always well done.

name: Phillips, Grace
description: Grace is a shining light, And a beauty contestant too. What ever would she do? If it were not for Zeb.

name: Talley, Alvin
motto: "In ignorance there is bliss."

name: Martin, Monroe
description: Monroe is an excellent student; He doesn't do things that he shouldn't. He generally makes an "A" grade. And we can assure you it is without aid.

name: Hughes, Claud
description: "Hut" is a boy of master mind. If you don't back out he will leave you behind.

name: Spicer, Frank
description: Some people love their money, But Frank loves his "Jewel."

name: Sievey, Deward
description: Oh, girls! He's fun. Never from any girl was he known to run; He's quick and smart, and can flirt. Let me tell you, girls, he's an expert.

name: Everett, Horace
description: A more quiet and studious boy could not be found. If you should look the whole world round.

name: McNees, Ray
description: Ray has a poetical name, And may he live to win great fame.

name: Williams, Ludie
description: A jolly girl is this, But a golden opportunity She will never miss.

name: Roper, Lois
description: She looks so neat and talks so sweet, To be with her is quite a treat.

name: Wheeler, Edwin
description: From the way he works it's our suspicion That he'll be a mathematician.

name: Hudson, Artice
description: Artice Hudson is a big stunt boy. The ladies and football are all his joy.

name: Evans, Josie
description: Sweet as a peach, pretty as a rose, Who wouldn't love her, nobody knows.

name: Booth, Mildred
description: She's a beauty, you may bet, Sweet sixteen and single yet.

name: Walker, Walter Hugh
motto: "Business then pleasure" is his rule.
description: A good leader in society and school.

name: Patterson, Cad
description: A faithful worker in society and school, And everyone knows he's nobody's fool.

name: McMahen, Birdie
description: She loves nature and she loves art, And she never tries to shirk; In her books she does her part, And always likes to work.

name: Meeks, Eudora
description: She's a honey, don't you doubt, Boys, not bees, have found it out.

name: Bennett, Charlie
description: This is a student that gets up his tasks, He generally does all that his teacher asks, He is just the same every day.

name: Price, Mona
description: Miss Mona Price looks so neat and nice, And you'll like her better when you meet her twice.

name: Owen, Truman
description: It is hard to tell what Owen is going to make. He will either be an egg tester, or poultry teacher. As he has the material that it will take, And he is also a very good speaker.

name: Keith, Edwin
description: Edwin Keith is a studious lad; Examinations make him glad.

name: King, Lola
description: Lola King is a sweet little lass, Among the smartest in the class.

name: Craine, Nina
description: This is a girl that has a hard time, She gets up her lessons and works very nice; She knows that a sweetheart is hard to find, But along this line she needs some advice.

name: Pelt, Clifford
description: He's very popular among the girls, But he likes the one that has the curls.

name: Taylor, Raymond
description: Tubby is the dairy man, Catch him, ladies, while you can, He's a thrifty business lad; Some sweet day you'll wish you had.

name: Lloyd, Esther
description: Some people ask my name, I tell them that it is Esther; They ask: "Do you like stout or lame?" I tell them I like the hester.

name: Watson, Ordis
description: Old "Wattenhurner" is a good old boy, He is not bashful, As he lives at Nashville, And to jump high is his greatest joy.

name: Stow, Tessie
description: Tessie Stow is neat and sweet. At flattering boys she can't be beat.

name: Booth, Roy
description: Roy Booth is long and tall. He can work algebra but he can't play ball.

name: Bunch, Arnold
description: This is a boy that has lots of fame, As well as you could expect. In the future he will have a great name, Just for the purpose of reading his text.

name: Hendrix, Christine
description: She is a girl that is thought well by all, And she looks so nice and neat. She fears not a task that is large or small, And of course she is hard to beat.

name: Burrus, Opal
description: Sweet and lovable, never blue! To her friends she's always true.

name: Mccollum, John
description: He's a studious lad and always bent On taking out less than ninety per cent.

name: Beels, Dewey
motto: "Try it again."
description: Dewey Beels has a solemn grin; His motto is, "Try it again."

name: Hunt, Lynn
description: The prettiest girl you ever saw in your life. It's only her fault that she's nobody's wife.

name: Weaver, Luther
description: He is a most horrible traitor To the cook and the waiter, As he licks his plate clean And wants another bean.

name: Mcdonald, Mildred
description: Not as other women are, She excels these all by far. Quiet, studious to be sure, Loyal, lovable, sweet and pure.

name: Stewart, Doyle
description: Doyle Stewart is a rounder's name, On the basketball field he won his fame.

name: Cleary, Roy
description: Roy Cleary is little but loud; Of such a student we are proud.

name: Stone, Eva
description: She is a sweet little dame For some boy to charm.

name: Riddling, Hattie Mae
description: Hattie Mae is a jolly good girl, Fair as a lily and pretty as a pearl.

name: Pelt, Leonard
description: Leonard Pelt is bound to win For he tackles every task with a grin.

name: Hornaday, Robert
description: General mechanic of the Hill, Tackles problems with a will; Keeps up with the modern styles; All the lasses call him "Smiles."

name: Russel, Mary
description: She is one that has sugar beat, That is something worth while; For Hick to be with her is a treat, As she always casts him a smile.

name: Mclendon, Chester
description: This is a boy that likes to play football, And end is his position, He hits his man, if he is large or small, And knocks out his ambition.

name: Cora, Jerry
description: Just a little doll is she. Good goods come in small packs, you see.

name: Chester, Ledbetter
description: Chester Ledbetter is a lady's man. He talks to Tessie whenever he can.

name: Delton, Mallock
description: He works in town every day he can. But Sunday proves him a lady's man.

name: Marjorie, Yocum
description: She sings like a mocking bird. With the sweetest voice you ever heard.

name: Velma Ruth, Smith
description: She is pleasant, wise and witty. Yet she's single: what a pity.

name: Carl, Wallace
description: Carl Wallace is a fine, big boy. And talking to one is her greatest joy.

name: Claud, Wallis
description: He's a hard worker and a studious lad. You will find his lessons are never bad.

name: Maydelle, Chaney
description: Sometimes she's cross and again she's funny. When she is sweet, she is a honey.

name: Frieda, Pryor
description: She is a girl on whom you may depend. To work and try; she knows it's not a sin. She finishes her tasks right up to the end. And life's success she is sure to win.
